title: Creative Localization Readback
description: Exact provider-backed localization state for one creative. Presence means every requested source/target variant was read back completely; sellers MUST fail closed instead of returning this object when any locale, resolved asset, provider identity, review state, or launch state is missing or lossy.

platform_id.description: Stable provider creative identity shared by the localized variants.

review_scope.description: Whether the provider reports review independently per locale variant or only for the creative as a whole. With `creative`, every variant MUST echo the same provider-backed status and launch_status.

variants.description: The source variant followed by every target variant. Each entry contains fully resolved assets after inheritance or provider generation; partial override bags are never returned here.

locale_variant_id.description: Buyer-assigned stable locale-variant identity from the request.

role.description: Source/default variant versus a target locale variant. Exactly one entry MUST be source.

translation_mode.description: How this locale's assets were obtained. Source entries use `source`; target entries preserve the request's explicit translation mode.

assets.description: Complete resolved assets for this locale, keyed by creative slot. All source inheritance and provider generation has already been applied.

provider_variant_id.description: Stable provider-native identity or label for this exact locale execution. It is evidence, not buyer-authored provider input.

status.description: Provider-backed review lifecycle state for this locale variant.

launch_status.description: Provider-backed serving eligibility for this locale variant. `ready` means the provider reports the variant eligible, not that the buyer has authorized spend. `pending` means provider processing/review is unfinished. `blocked` means a provider or policy condition prevents launch.

launch_blockers.description: Machine-readable reasons this locale variant is blocked. Required and non-empty when launch_status is `blocked`; omitted otherwise.
